personal_profile.headline: Engineering Manager
personal_profile.summary: Engineering leader with strong technical background and team management experience.

bullets.text: Led team of 12 engineers across 3 squads, delivering platform improvements that increased user retention by 25%.
Oversaw architectural decisions for microservices migration, reducing deployment time by 40%.
Built engineering team from 5 to 12, implementing structured hiring process and mentoring for senior engineers.
Technical lead for distributed data processing pipeline handling 50TB+ daily.
Mentored 4 junior engineers to senior level and led design reviews for team projects.
Built basic frontend features and fixed bugs in early-stage startup product.
